requirement_topic.en: NERC / ECN Energy Efficiency Labeling Expectations
requirement_topic.zh: NERC / ECN能效标签预期要求
requirement_topic.zht: NERC / ECN能效標籤預期要求

summary.en: Nigerian heat-pump and split AC imports are expected to align with national energy-efficiency policy direction including NERC and ECN programmes under the Nigeria Energy Efficiency Action Plan. Labeling, declared COP/SCOP values, and consumer-facing efficiency statements should reflect Nigeria-aligned metrics and formats.
summary.zh: 尼日利亚入境热泵与挂机空调需与国家能效方向对齐，包括NERC与ECN下的尼日利亚能效行动计划。标签、COP/SCOP披露和面向消费者的能效说明应采用尼日利亚对齐的口径和格式。
summary.zht: 尼日利亞入境熱泵與掛機空調需與國家能效方向對齊，包括NERC與ECN下的尼日利亞能效行動計劃。標籤、COP/SCOP披露和面向消費者的能效說明應採用尼日利亞對齊的口徑和格式。

standards_or_laws: Nigerian Electricity Regulatory Commission (NERC) energy efficiency programme guidance
Energy Commission of Nigeria (ECN) efficiency administration

summary.en: China uses GB 25454 and GB/T 7725 as COP and SCOP performance bases and energy label pathways. These methods provide useful baseline numbers but do not automatically satisfy Nigeria label structure or reporting conventions.
summary.zh: 中国使用GB 25454及GB/T 7725建立COP与SCOP基础并执行能效标签体系，可提供基础参数，但不自动满足尼日利亚标签结构及披露约定。
summary.zht: 中國使用GB 25454及GB/T 7725建立COP與SCOP基礎並執行能效標籤體系，可提供基礎參數，但不自動滿足尼日利亞標籤結構及披露約定。

gap.en: COP/SCOP numbers and product categories often need category-specific remapping. Label wording, calculation basis, and claim wording usually need a Nigeria-ready format before importer filing and sales.
gap.zh: COP/SCOP数值和产品类别通常需要按市场场景重映射。标签文案、计算口径和声明格式通常需要调整为尼日利亚可用版本后才能用于申报与销售。
gap.zht: COP/SCOP數值和產品類別通常需要按市場場景重映射。標籤文案、計算口徑和聲明格式通常需要調整為尼日利亞可用版本後才能用於申報與銷售。

mandatory_status.target: Expected where Nigeria market energy-efficiency policy applies; verify product class and scheme scope before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for many Chinese product classes; format and obligations differ in cross-market reuse

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap because energy-label format and declared metrics may differ; Chinese labels are a starting reference only.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 主要差距在于能效标签格式和计量口径可能不同，中文/中国标签仅可作为起点。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 主要差距在於能效標籤格式和計量口徑可能不同，中國標籤僅可作為起點。

requirement_topic.en: Grid and Voltage Context for Nigerian Deployment
requirement_topic.zh: 尼日利亚部署的电压电网要求
requirement_topic.zht: 尼日利亞部署的電壓電網要求

summary.en: Nigerian supply commonly uses 240/415 V with 50 Hz and single-phase 240 V for many consumer products. The frequency is aligned with China 50 Hz, while nominal phase voltage is slightly higher than the 220 V China reference, so wiring, ratings, and protection margins should be checked before final declaration.
summary.zh: 尼日利亚电力供应用例通常为240/415伏且50赫兹，很多消费类产品走单相240伏，频率与中国50赫兹一致，但名义相电压较中国常见220伏偏高，需在最终申明前核对接线、额定和保护余量。
summary.zht: 尼日利亞電力供應用例通常為240／415伏且50赫茲，多數消費類產品走單相240伏，頻率與中國50赫茲一致，但名義相電壓較中國常見220伏偏高，需在最終申明前核對接線、額定和保護餘量。

standards_or_laws: Nigerian utility supply context (240/415 V 50 Hz)
National installation and product use practice guidance

summary.en: China uses predominantly 220 V single-phase with 50 Hz for many appliances and a different nominal grid profile. The same frequency reduces functional mismatch, but single-phase voltage differs from 220 V and may need model declaration alignment.
summary.zh: 中国许多家用类产品以220伏50赫兹为常见基准，电气参数设定与尼日利亚240伏体系不同；频率一致有利于兼容，但电压标注和型号声明通常需重核。
summary.zht: 中國許多家用類產品以220伏50赫茲為常見基準，電氣參數設定與尼日利亞240伏體系不同；頻率一致有利於兼容，但電壓標註和型號聲明通常需重核。

standards_or_laws: GB electrical installation and rating context

gap.en: Labeling and installation instructions often need voltage context correction even when efficiency and safety test frameworks are already aligned. The target is to confirm compatibility against 240 V single-phase and 50 Hz deployment.
gap.zh: 即使安全和效率框架可对接，产品说明和标签也常需按240伏单相和50赫兹的实际使用情境重标注。
gap.zht: 即使安全和能效框架可對接，產品說明和標籤也常需按240伏單相和50赫茲的實際使用情境重標註。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for marketability and safe deployment declarations
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory domestically under Chinese compliance where relevant; adaptation needed for Nigeria deployment

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Frequency alignment is favorable, but voltage and rating declarations still require explicit Nigeria-facing confirmation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 频率对齐有利，但电压与额定值声明仍需明确的尼日利亚版本确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 頻率對齊有利，但電壓與額定值聲明仍需明確的尼日利亞版本確認。
